name: PACCAR
analysis: PCAR has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $117.5789. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry $117.5789, stop $105.7023, target $122.5800. Risk/reward is 0.42:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
